privacyBody: Sensitive meeting content and managed media are encrypted locally. Operational metadata such as project titles and original file names stays on this device but is not fully encrypted. Content is sent externally only when you request a task from a configured provider.
inactivityHint: Choose Never to disable automatic locking after inactivity or when returning from the background. You can still lock AccordMesh manually, and it always starts locked.
sourceAutoHint: Auto detect lets different transcript segments use different languages. Accuracy may drop when people switch languages quickly or speak over one another.
translationDisabledHint: The original transcript remains available, but AccordMesh will not create translations.
analysisFallbackHint: If translation is off, this option uses the interface language.
workspaceDescription: Manage language, audio, providers, security, and other local settings.
generalDescription: Choose the default provider and automatic-lock behavior.
defaultProviderHint: Used for new tasks unless you choose another provider in that workflow.
manualLockDescription: You can still use Lock now, and AccordMesh always starts locked, even when automatic locking is set to Never.
appearanceDescription: Adjust the live overlay for comfortable use during longer meetings.
audioDescription: Review how AccordMesh selects and handles microphone input during live meetings.
audioDeviceDescription: AccordMesh checks the selected microphone when a meeting starts.
audioPrivacyDescription: AccordMesh may temporarily store encrypted audio segments while processing, then removes them after successful completion. Raw audio is not added to the project library.
languageDescription: Choose source-language detection, optional translation, and the languages used for analysis and minutes.
securityDescription: Review local storage and actions that permanently delete data.
dangerZoneDescription: Resetting the encrypted vault permanently deletes AccordMesh-managed local data on this device. Files previously exported outside AccordMesh are not deleted.
advancedDescription: Configure MockProvider for local development and testing.
mockDescription: Use synthetic provider results without external network calls.
mockScenarioHint: This scenario applies to future MockProvider tasks.
aboutDescription: Product information and the local-first data model.
localFirstDescription: AccordMesh keeps application data on this device by default. Sensitive payloads and managed media are encrypted; operational metadata remains in local SQLite. Content leaves the device only when you explicitly send it to a configured provider.
mockSaveFailedFeedback: MockProvider scenario could not be saved.
resetFailedFeedback: The local vault could not be reset.
